capabilities.description: Long-term semantic + episodic memory for AI agents
capabilities.notes:
Pick depends on whether you need just vector recall (mem0 / pgvector),
paged long-context (letta / MemGPT), graph + vector hybrid (cognee /
graphrag), or framework integration (llama_index).

signals.description: 🪢 Open source LLM engineering platform: LLM Observability, metrics, evals, prompt management, playground, datasets. Integrates with OpenTelemetry, Langchain, OpenAI SDK, LiteLLM, and more. 🍊YC W23

The open source AI engineering platform for agents, LLMs, and ML models. MLflow enables teams of all sizes to debug, evaluate, monitor, and optimize production-quality AI applications while controlling costs and managing access to models and data.
AI Observability & Evaluation
Open-source observability for your GenAI or LLM application, based on OpenTelemetry
The open-source LLMOps platform: prompt playground, prompt management, LLM evaluation, and LLM observability all in one place.
🧊 Open source LLM observability platform. One line of code to monitor, evaluate, and experiment. YC W23 🍓

The open source AI engineering platform for agents, LLMs, and ML models. MLflow enables teams of all sizes to debug, evaluate, monitor, and optimize production-quality AI applications while controlling costs and managing access to models and data.

The LLM Evaluation Framework

capabilities.description: Vector database for semantic search / RAG

signals.description: Qdrant - High-performance, massive-scale Vector Database and Vector Search Engine for the next generation of AI. Also available in the cloud https://cloud.qdrant.io/
Search infrastructure for AI
Milvus is a high-performance, cloud-native vector database built for scalable vector ANN search
Developer-friendly OSS embedded retrieval library for multimodal AI. Search More; Manage Less.

Weaviate is an open-source vector database that stores both objects and vectors, allowing for the combination of vector search with structured filtering with the fault tolerance and scalability of a cloud-native database​.

capabilities.description: Graph database for knowledge / dependency reasoning

signals.description: [EMNLP2025] "LightRAG: Simple and Fast Retrieval-Augmented Generation"
High-performance open-source in-memory graph database for GraphRAG, AI memory, agentic AI, and real-time graph analytics. Cypher-compatible, built in C++.
Graphs for Everyone
Graph database optimized for fast analysis and real-time data processing. It is provided as an extension to PostgreSQL.

capabilities.description: Decide where (vector / graph / SQL) a query should retrieve from
capabilities.notes:
Most "memory routers" are framework-internal. These projects expose
the routing logic in different shapes — pick based on whether you
want declarative routing rules (graphrag), LLM-classifier routing
(llama_index), or implicit auto-routing (mem0 / lightrag).
